text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm walking with Sakura Chiyono O after
training, we notice Rice Shower in what seems to
be a predicament.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sob... I'm so scared...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What are you doing in a place like this, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I just went on a run to the shrine, but when I
stopped to take a break, I realized that I lost my
phone...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What?! That's terrible! We have to look for it
right away!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But the shrine is so dark at night, and there's no
one around. It's so scary...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It would be pretty scary to go alone...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll go with you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't just leave you here, and I'm sure you'll feel
better if you have someone with you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and while we're at it, why don't we run there?
It'll be good training, so think of it like killing two
birds with one stone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand she's worried about Rice Shower, but
she's already run a lot today...
choice_data_list: Make sure you come right back.
Make sure you come right back.
I'll come too, so let's walk instead.
I'll come too, so let's walk instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand she's worried about Rice Shower, but
she's already run a lot today...
choice_data_list: Make sure you come right back.
Make sure you come right back.
I'll come too, so let's walk instead.
I'll come too, so let's walk instead.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! Don't you worry, we'll be back in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Can we hold hands when we get to the shrine?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'm not great with spooky stuff either, so
I'd appreciate that too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite their fears, the two of them set off for
the shrine at full speed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're coming too?
choice_data_list: Think of it as doing a cooldown together.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's a wonderful idea! It won't be scary at all
with three of us, and going on a walk together
sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay. Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have a good time strolling to the shrine as a
group, and we find Rice Shower's phone waiting
there for us.
